raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchase with my Macy 's store credit card for an item on XXXX Order # : XXXX. I never got the item, it was lost/missing and the tracking number was not working. I had two call / chat with them several times for hours on end. They told me to check in 24 hours, then 48 hours, then they said they would reship in 3 days, 10 days, 15 days. After I said I would file a CFPB complaint, they reshipped the item. The tracking for that item was also a dead link! The item is not in transit. I contacted them again and they said I wait to wait 48 hours, then they said 24 hours. I just want a refund to my credit card at this point. I've spent hours and hours troubleshooting this with them. I'm about this pay this off on the credit card but I have no item.
